description:
**Milestone:** Phase 2: Component Expansion

Build hx-divider: visual separator for content sections and field groups. Horizontal and vertical orientations. Simple TWIG usage, no JS needed beyond CE registration.

**Files to Modify:**
- packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-divider/

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Horizontal and vertical orientations
- [ ] With text/label slot
- [ ] Thickness and color via tokens
- [ ] CSS parts: line, label
- [ ] ARIA: role=separator, aria-orientation
- [ ] <5KB gzipped

**Complexity:** small
title: Implement hx-divider component
